## Description

Brief description of what this PR does and why.

## Related Issue

Closes #(issue number)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)

## Changes Made

- Change 1
- Change 2

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards (`src.` import prefix, type hints, English comments)
- [ ] I have run `python -m ruff check src/` with no errors
- [ ] I have run `python -m pytest -q` and all tests pass
- [ ] I have run `python scripts/doctor.py --imports --contracts --strict` with no errors
- [ ] I have run `python scripts/i18n_audit.py` with no new violations
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed
- [ ] New i18n keys are seeded in all 5 languages (DE, EN, FR, ES, IT)

Before / After screenshots for UI changes.
